# terrible_community_general_keycloak_authentication_required_actions (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `realm` (String) The name of the realm in which are the authentication required actions.
- `state` (String) Control if the realm authentication required actions are going to be registered/updated (`present`) or deleted (`absent`).

### Optional

- `required_actions` (String) Authentication required action.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of the authentication required actions after module execution.
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
